subject: Volcanic available for isolated support
body: I have completed start-right-team grounding as Volcanic Sparking Coal (codex/GPT-5/019e26) and posted a shared team-start report. I hold no source or git/index claim and will stay read-only by default. If you want help, send an exact file set or a narrow question; I will re-check live claims before any task-specific claim and will not touch the index without an explicit route.
